channel.title: Introduction on PracticallyProductivity
channel.description: Recent content in Introduction on PracticallyProductivity

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Since this is my first post on this blog, I decided to do a little introduction of myself. I go by the name ‘rayes’ online. Of course, that isn’t my actual name, just a pseudonym. You can find some general stuff about me and this site on the About page. As that already exists and you can read it there, I will (try) and not repeat myself too much and will mostly be going into more detail about how exactly I got into privacy and linux.
